dict.string: petOS reads upcoming Calendar events and now-playing music metadata to choose the pet's mood.
petOS checks whether a Focus mode is active so the pet quiets down during deep work.
petOS reads upcoming Calendar events to reflect your schedule in the pet's behavior.
petOS reads upcoming Calendar events to reflect your schedule in the pet's behavior.
petOS observes notification delivery log entries to react to notifications you receive.
petOS uses Accessibility to detect gestures (like swiping down) even when it is not the active app.
